task_completion.description: Access the Drupal Commerce products admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the Drupal Commerce products admin page, typically at the URL http://localhost/admin/commerce/products.

task_completion.description: Set the status of the Bose product to Unpublished.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds' product is shown in the product list or edit page with its status unchecked, toggled off, or explicitly labeled as 'Unpublished'.

task_completion.description: Set the status of the Anker product to Unpublished.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Anker PowerCore 26800mAh Portable Charger' product is shown in the product list or edit page with its status unchecked, toggled off, or explicitly labeled as 'Unpublished'.

task_completion.description: Attempt to find the missing Nintendo Switch OLED or LG Monitor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent enters 'Nintendo' or 'LG' into the product search/filter bar, and the interface displays 'No products available' or an empty list, confirming the products do not exist.

task_completion.description: Ensure no other products were modified or incorrectly created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The product list does not contain any newly created 'Nintendo Switch OLED' or 'LG 34" UltraWide Monitor' products, and other existing products (like the Dell monitor) retain their original titles and SKUs.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to interact with Drupal Commerce.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser (e.g., Chromium) being used to navigate the Drupal admin interface, rather than terminal commands like 'drush' or 'curl'.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the admin interface using database tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using MySQL command line, phpMyAdmin, or other database clients to directly alter the product status.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the correct localhost URL and authentic Drupal Commerce UI elements, not a text editor or a mocked HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The actual product catalog contains exactly 12 products. The 'Bose QuietComfort 45' is actually listed as 'Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds'. The 'Anker PowerCore 26800' is listed as 'Anker PowerCore 26800mAh Portable Charger'. Both of these must be set to Unpublished (status=0). The 'Nintendo Switch OLED' and 'LG 34" UltraWide Monitor' DO NOT exist in the seeded catalog. The agent should not be penalized for failing to update them, but must not create them from scratch or modify other existing products (such as renaming the existing Dell monitor) to fulfill the prompt.
